site.name: Easy Roof Hub
site.description: Roofing quote platform connecting Arizona homeowners with vetted local contractors.

services.name: Roof Replacement
services.description: Full tear-off and replacement for aging or storm-damaged roofs.

services.name: Roof Repair
services.description: Targeted repairs for leaks, missing shingles, and flashing failures.

services.name: Emergency Tarping
services.description: Immediate temporary protection after storm damage or blow-off.

services.name: Storm Damage Inspection
services.description: Insurance-ready inspection reports for hail, wind, and monsoon damage.

services.name: Free Roof Quote
services.description: No-obligation estimate matched to a vetted local contractor.
